text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few weeks before Admire Vega runs in the
Hopeful Stakes...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And that was our debut race at Hanshin
Racecourse under today's wintry rain! The
favorite, Narita Top Road, missed out on first
place by a neck, finishing a close second!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan A
text_block_list.text: Aaaah... Top Road, you were sooo close!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Could it have been her form? She looked a cut
above the rest while in the paddock. I guess
maybe she needs more time...

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you'll be fine, Top Road! I know you're
training so hard every day! You'll definitely win
the next race!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your support, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry for such a disappointing
performance! But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I promise I'll do everything I can to
deliver a good result!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Please continue to cheer me on!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan A
text_block_list.text: Awww, Top Road!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan B
text_block_list.text: I'll definitely be there to support you! So just keep doing your best!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I'll get it next time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Next time for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Time moves forward, and the day of the Hopeful
Stakes arrives.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to both the fame of her mother and her
own innate talent, Admire Vega's popularity has
skyrocketed recently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even from the prep room, the thunderous
cheering of the crowd can be heard. It wouldn't
be an exaggeration to say the majority of it is
directed at her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Though she doesn't seem to take notice...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, can you show me the race schedule?
There's something I want to check.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems quite unmoved, just like after her
debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Single-mindedly determined to amass victories in
dedication to her late sister, she is largely
unaffected by her surroundings.
choice_data_list: (I guess we could consider it her strength.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But as I'm lost in thought...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Hello! Sorry, it's me, Narita Top Road!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Um! Are you in the middle of a meeting or
anything?
choice_data_list: It's fine. Did you come to give her your support?
It's fine. Did you come to give her your support?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Today is an important race for Ayabe, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You have a race tomorrow as well, right?
Shouldn't you spend your time preparing for that?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Well, actually, I had a slightly
disappointing result at my debut race the other
day.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
But seeing my classmates race reenergizes me, so
I came here for my own benefit!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I guess there's no problem then.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You know, you're really amazing, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Did you read Twinkle Monthly's popularity poll?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The survey Narita Top Road mentions is one of
many conducted by the popular publication
Twinkle Monthly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the lead up to big events, the magazine
conducts polls online and collects the opinions of
its journalists, then releases the information in the
form of pre-race popularity rankings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although actual popularity on the day of the race
is a different story, the survey is respected as one
way of measuring the potential of the racers.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Among all the talented junior-year runners taking
on the Hopeful Stakes, you're listed as the
favorite, just like you were before your debut.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
It's incredible. You can hear everyone talking
about you just by taking a short walk through the
stands.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: They're all... expecting you to succeed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: So, um... well...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
It must be difficult... even scary. What if you can't live
up to those expectations?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ah, um! Sorry! What am I saying? Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: My purpose hasn't changed.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I don't care who or what is around me. Even if I
experience difficulty or pain, if I'm at a
disadvantage, or if I'm being reckless or naive...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
None of it matters as long as I bear the burden
I've taken on and see it to its end...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's what I call "resolve."

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Resolve...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Resolve is crucial, especially when you're alone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
When the only things that can give you
momentum are your own two feet, they become
an unwavering force against the turf below.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's what I believe.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Admire Vega then exits the prep room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a stride that bears an unwavering resolve...
she advances toward her solitary battle, the
Hopeful Stakes.
